task_completion.description: Navigate to and open Michael Chen's 'On Hold' order in the WooCommerce admin panel.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The WooCommerce 'Edit Order' page is visible, showing Michael Chen (michael.chen@example.com) as the customer and the status as 'On hold'.

task_completion.description: Remove the 'Organic Cotton T-Shirt' from the order.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Organic Cotton T-Shirt' (SKU: OCT-BLK-M) is no longer visible in the itemized list of products on the order page.

task_completion.description: Add one 'Merino Wool Sweater' to the order.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Merino Wool Sweater' (SKU: MWS-GRY-L) is visible in the itemized list of products on the order page with a quantity of 1.
The order totals have been updated to reflect the price of the new item, or the 'Recalculate' button has been clicked and the totals section shows the new calculated amounts.

task_completion.description: Save the changes to the order.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message such as 'Order updated.' is visible at the top of the page, or the 'Update' button in the Order Actions panel has been clicked.

integrity.description: The agent used the WooCommerce web GUI rather than terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a web browser displaying the WordPress/WooCommerce admin dashboard, not a terminal window using WP-CLI or database commands.

integrity.description: The agent did not process any refunds or payments.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of the agent clicking 'Refund' or interacting with payment gateway settings, adhering to the instruction to only update order contents.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual application without using browser developer tools to fake the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Browser developer tools (Inspect Element) are not open, and the page layout appears as a standard WooCommerce admin interface.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Customer: Michael Chen (michael.chen@example.com). Item to remove: 'Organic Cotton T-Shirt' (SKU: OCT-BLK-M). Item to add: 'Merino Wool Sweater' (SKU: MWS-GRY-L). Expected quantity of added item: 1.
